app.name: Voquill
app.one_liner: An open-source, cross-platform AI voice typing app that enables dictation into any desktop application with local or cloud transcription, AI text cleanup, and personal glossary sync.

screens.name: Chats
screens.purpose: Engage in voice-driven conversational interactions with AI assistants.

screens.name: Dictionary
screens.purpose: Add custom terms and replacement rules so Voquill always spells recurring names and phrases correctly.

screens.name: History
screens.purpose: Browse and replay past transcriptions with full audio playback.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Display user streaks, words per minute, and recent transcriptions at a glance.

screens.name: Providers
screens.purpose: Configure transcription and post-processing by bringing your own API key or selecting local Whisper.

screens.name: Writing Styles
screens.purpose: Switch between tones like Polished, Verbatim, and Chat to control how voice sounds on the page.

rust_commands.name: connect_air_dictation
rust_commands.purpose: Pair mobile device as remote microphone for desktop dictation (alpha feature).

rust_commands.name: paste_globally
rust_commands.purpose: Inject cleaned transcription into active application via system-wide paste shortcut, working even over full-screen apps.

rust_commands.name: start_local_transcription
rust_commands.purpose: Initiate speech-to-text processing using local Whisper engine with optional GPU acceleration.

rust_commands.name: sync_glossary
rust_commands.purpose: Apply personal dictionary terms and replacement rules during post-processing to ensure accurate transcription.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add global paste functionality on macOS and Windows
week 1: Implement basic overlay UI with recording toggle
week 1: Integrate local Whisper transcription pipeline
week 1: Set up Turborepo with Tauri desktop shell
week 2: Build home screen with recent transcripts
week 2: Implement AI text cleanup with filler word removal
week 2: Support provider switching (local vs cloud)
week 3: Add Linux Wayland support and global keybinding
week 3: Enable transcription history with playback
week 3: Implement audio dimming during recording
acceptance_tests: Air Dictation pairs mobile device and streams audio to desktop for transcription (alpha).
On Linux under Wayland, global paste shortcut works after configuring custom keybinding.
Recording activation chime plays reliably regardless of transcription engine (local or cloud).
User can start dictation via hotkey, speak, and paste cleaned text into any app—even over full-screen macOS windows.
When using local Whisper, transcription respects personal dictionary terms and applies selected writing style.
